positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized celestial flora illustration featuring bioluminescent deep-sea elements and cosmic astronomical motifs. The central composition shows a cluster of intertwined lunar branches and stylized glowing jellyfish tentacles, anchored by intricate root systems that evoke mythical mangrove roots. The color palette is restricted to deep indigo, electric cyan, vibrant lavender, and warm gold highlights, providing maximum contrast against a muted, ethereal navy background. The style is clean, graphic, and highly decorative, emphasizing strong, identifiable silhouettes suitable for screen printing on apparel. Use dotwork and crisp line art details, rendered with a stylized woodcut and vaporwave blend, ensuring sharp edges and graphic punch.
